description: Role and permission config for the FIN04 board. Everyone starts as the default role. Admin is unlocked by passcode and gains import and manual per-asset energisation editing. NOTE: this is a client-side deterrent on a static site, not enforced security. For real enforcement put the board behind SSO/an auth proxy or a backend that serves data by authenticated role.

permissions.view: See the board and drill into every tier
permissions.export: Download snapshot.json and the per-asset config
permissions.edit_energisation: Manually set energisation status on a selected asset

admin_unlock.note: SHA-256 of the admin passcode. To change it: sha256 your new passcode and replace this value. Default passcode is 'FIN04-admin'. Change it before go-live.
